segments.text: This is Misty. Misty is the second gym leader from Gen 1, but today I want to find out how she would
have done in Pokemon Crystal. Because we've already done a couple of these, we saw Lorelei
once do a pretty good job of getting through Pokemon Crystal, and then we saw Brock get
completely destroyed. The question is, how is Misty going to do, given the fact that Starmie,
her ace, is actually a legitimately strong Pokemon, and even the Staryu isn't a slouch,
Plus, she's going to be using some same type water type moves, and she has smart AI, so she will use, generally speaking, the best moves possible against her opponents.
It could be a situation where Misty actually dramatically outperforms compared to the previous run that we did with Brock.
However, there is one major potential roadblock sitting in front of us, and that is that we will be going up against Rival 2's Bayleaf.
And because it has Razor Leaf early on, it might completely destroy our Pokemon.
Still, today as we come and meet Professor Elm, he's obviously been spending some time
in Kanto, and he gives us a level 21 Starmie and a level 18 Staryu, just like what Misty
would have in her actual gym.
So now it's just a question of whether or not Misty can actually manage to progress
with this team, but today we're going to find out just how far a Gen 1 Misty could
actually get in Gen 2 with her starting team, with no XP gained, the exact same stats as
